title: Japanese Nabemono Hot Pot
description: A traditional Japanese hot pot dish that combines flavors and textures in a delicious meal. This recipe serves 4.
instructions: 1. Cut the celery into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
2. Slice the mushrooms and bamboo shoots.
3. Cut the tofu into small cubes.
4. Heat the sesame oil in a large pot over medium heat.
5. Add the sliced mushrooms and bamboo shoots and cook until they start to brown.
6. Add the tofu and cook until it starts to brown.
7. Pour in the nabemono broth and bring to a boil.
8. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
9. Add the celery and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
10. Season with soy sauce and sesame seeds.
11. Serve hot with green onions on top.
